tracks.meaning: an ordered list or table that allows rapid location of data by reference numbers or keys
a numerical indicator that measures changes in the value of a group of securities or economic factors over time
the forefinger or pointer finger used for indicating or pointing
the alphabetical list of topics or names with page references at the end of a book
to point to or indicate something with one's finger or a pointer
a number or symbol placed as a subscript to indicate a power or position in a series
a numerical ratio or coefficient expressing a relationship between measurements or characteristics
an official list or registry of names, records, or documents
something that serves as a sign, indicator, or pointer to something else
a reference system that organizes and retrieves information from a database or filing system
